job_title: Giảng viên Kỹ thuật Phần mềm (Software Engineering Instructor)
required_skills: 3+ years of experience as a Senior Software Engineer or Tech Lead
Proficiency in at least one framework: Spring Boot, .NET Core, or React
key_responsibilities: Deliver training on software development processes (Agile/Scrum), Design Patterns, and Microservices
Supervise students’ real‑world projects following a practical project model
Collaborate with the business relations department to keep technology trends up to date
